title: Amtech S4305 6 Piece 8mm D-Shackle Set
features: DURABLE: These 8mm D-shackles are from tough, zinc plated forged steel
EASY TO USE: With a 16mm shackle width and an easy-fastening thumb screw, they are easy to use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 6x D-shackles See more

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Lifting, Securing, Connecting, Garage, Workshop, Outdoor Activities
